data.acceptance:
1. Agent-owned queued gate beats are takeable in Foolery UI surfaces that currently expose Take!/Scene! actions.
2. Human-owned gate beats remain non-claimable and continue to appear under Escalations via `requiresHumanAction=true`.
3. `/api/beats/ready` and related ready/claimable paths do not exclude gate beats solely because `type="gate"`.
4. Wave/readiness surfaces no longer force all gate beats into human-only readiness; they follow owner-derived claimability and human-action semantics.
5. Regression tests cover both agent-owned and human-owned gate cases.
